'''hoshahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klutzy|klutzy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klutzy|klutzy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hoshahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hoshahithi|hoshahithi]] || [[word:hoshahiji|hoshahiji]] || [[word:hoshahishi|hoshahishi]] || [[word:hoshahiki|hoshahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hoshahuthuthu|hoshahuthuthu]] || [[word:hoshahujuju|hoshahujuju]] || [[word:hoshahushushu|hoshahushushu]] || [[word:hoshahukuku|hoshahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hoshahuthu|hoshahuthu]] || [[word:hoshahuju|hoshahuju]] || [[word:hoshahushu|hoshahushu]] || [[word:hoshahuku|hoshahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hoshahufthuf|hoshahufthuf]] || [[word:hoshahufjuf|hoshahufjuf]] || [[word:hoshahufshuf|hoshahufshuf]] || [[word:hoshahufkuf|hoshahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hoshahethe|hoshahethe]] || [[word:hoshaheje|hoshaheje]] || [[word:hoshaheshe|hoshaheshe]] || [[word:hoshaheke|hoshaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hoshahothotho|hoshahothotho]] || [[word:hoshahojojo|hoshahojojo]] || [[word:hoshahoshosho|hoshahoshosho]] || [[word:hoshahokoko|hoshahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hoshahotho|hoshahotho]] || [[word:hoshahojo|hoshahojo]] || [[word:hoshahosho|hoshahosho]] || [[word:hoshahoko|hoshahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hoshahofthof|hoshahofthof]] || [[word:hoshahofjof|hoshahofjof]] || [[word:hoshahofshof|hoshahofshof]] || [[word:hoshahofkof|hoshahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hoshahïfthïf|hoshahïfthïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfjïf|hoshahïfjïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfshïf|hoshahïfshïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfkïf|hoshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hoshahïfthïfthïf|hoshahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfjïfjïf|hoshahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfshïfshïf|hoshahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfkïfkïf|hoshahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hoshahïfthïf|hoshahïfthïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfjïf|hoshahïfjïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfshïf|hoshahïfshïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfkïf|hoshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hoshahïfthïf|hoshahïfthïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfjïf|hoshahïfjïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfshïf|hoshahïfshïf]] || [[word:hoshahïfkïf|hoshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hoshahæthæ|hoshahæthæ]] || [[word:hoshahæjæ|hoshahæjæ]] || [[word:hoshahæshæ|hoshahæshæ]] || [[word:hoshahækæ|hoshahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hoshahathatha|hoshahathatha]] || [[word:hoshahajaja|hoshahajaja]] || [[word:hoshahashasha|hoshahashasha]] || [[word:hoshahakaka|hoshahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hoshahatha|hoshahatha]] || [[word:hoshahaja|hoshahaja]] || [[word:hoshahasha|hoshahasha]] || [[word:hoshahaka|hoshahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hoshahafthaf|hoshahafthaf]] || [[word:hoshahafjaf|hoshahafjaf]] || [[word:hoshahafshaf|hoshahafshaf]] || [[word:hoshahafkaf|hoshahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hoshahasha|hoshahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hoshahshësha|hoshahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hoshahrosha|hoshahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hoshahmusha|hoshahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hoshahyasha|hoshahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohoshahnkshësha|gohoshahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohoshahnkrosha|gohoshahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohoshahnkmusha|gohoshahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohoshahnkyasha|gohoshahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hoshashahasha|hoshashahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hoshashahshësha|hoshashahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hoshashahrosha|hoshashahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hoshashahmusha|hoshashahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hoshashahyasha|hoshashahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohoshashahnkshësha|gohoshashahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohoshashahnkrosha|gohoshashahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohoshashahnkmusha|gohoshashahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohoshashahnkyasha|gohoshashahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:heshæhasha|heshæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:heshæhshësha|heshæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:heshæhrosha|heshæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:heshæhmusha|heshæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:heshæhyasha|heshæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goheshæhnkshësha|goheshæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goheshæhnkrosha|goheshæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goheshæhnkmusha|goheshæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goheshæhnkyasha|goheshæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hoshfahasha|hoshfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hoshfahshësha|hoshfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hoshfahrosha|hoshfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hoshfahmusha|hoshfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hoshfahyasha|hoshfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohoshfahnkshësha|gohoshfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohoshfahnkrosha|gohoshfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohoshfahnkmusha|gohoshfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohoshfahnkyasha|gohoshfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
